Caption: Schematic of the procedure for the preparation of (a) zinc-rich ethyl silicate coating and (b) zinc-rich ethyl silicate/nickel oxide nanocomposite coating.
FTIR analysis of zinc rich silicate coating with 3 % nano nickel oxide.
SEM images of zinc rich silicate coating (a) in the absence and (b) presence of 3 % nano nickel oxide.
EDX analysis of zinc rich silicate coating with 3 % nano nickel oxide.
AFM images of zinc rich silicate coating (a) in the absence and (b) presence of 3 % nano nickel oxide.
TEM images of (a) ethyl silicate coating with 3 wt% NiO nanoparticles and (b) zinc-rich ethyl silicate coating with 3 wt% NiO nanoparticles.
Variation of open circuit potentials vs. immersion time for zinc-rich ethyl silicate coatings containing different amounts of NiO nanoparticles.

Schematic of the different stages of (a) zinc-rich ethyl silicate coating and (b) zinc-rich ethyl silicate with the proper amount of NiO nanoparticles during 120 days of immersion in a saline solution.
Nyquist diagrams of ZRES0, ZRES1N, ZRES2N, ZRES3N, and ZRES4N coatings after being immersed in a 3.5 wt% NaCl solution for (a) 1 day, (b) 5, (c) 18, (d) 50, (e) 87, and (f) 120 days.
Phase plots of (a) ZRES0, (b) ZRES1N, (c) ZRES2N, (d) ZRES3N, and (e) ZRES4N coatings during 120 days of immersion in a 3.5 wt% NaCl solution.
Equivalent circuit for zinc rich silicate coating corrosion in a 3.5 wt% NaCl solution.
Bode plots of (a) ZRES0, (b) ZRES1N, (c) ZRES2N, (d) ZRES3N, and (e) ZRES4N coatings during 120 days of immersion in a 3.5 wt% NaCl solution.
The evolution of impedance at low frequency of ZRES0, ZRES1N, ZRES2N, ZRES3N, and ZRES4N coatings with immersion time in a 3.5 wt% NaCl solution.
Potentiodynamic polarization curves of ZRES0, ZRES1N, ZRES2N, ZRES3N, and ZRES4N coatings after 30 days immersion in a 3.5 wt% NaCl solution.
Salt spray test results of ZRES0, ZRES1N, ZRES2N, ZRES3N, and ZRES4N coatings during 28 days of exposure to a 5 % wt. NaCl spray condition.
XRD analysis of zinc rich silicate coating with 3 % nano nickel oxide after 28 days of exposure to a salt spray chamber.
Schematic of the proposed anticorrosion mechanisms for zinc-rich ethyl silicate coatings with the proper amount of NiO nanoparticles during immersion in a saline solution.
